notes:
The big one — two new sources, glass everywhere, a new face.

SOURCES: Royal Road (LitRPG), Wattpad (romance), Gutenberg classics — and Stories now searches all of them at once.

LISTENING: Bluetooth, car + headset controls. On-device "story so far" recaps. Player rebuilt.

LOOK: New droplet icon, and a splash where the drop rains in and the wordmark rises. Every sheet is real frosted glass.

FIXED: Gutenberg listed chapters back to front. Books tab never showed its list. Reader settings overflowed. Wattpad narrated its copyright notice.

Full changelog on the releases page.
